code: import React,{useEffect,useRef}from'react';import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";const MatrixBackground=()=>{const canvasRef=useRef(null);useEffect(()=>{const canvas=canvasRef.current;if(!canvas)return;const ctx=canvas.getContext('2d');const resize=()=>{canvas.width=window.innerWidth;canvas.height=window.innerHeight;};resize();const chars='ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ123456789@#$%^&*()*&^%+-/~{[|`]}'.split('');const fontSize=10;const columns=canvas.width/fontSize;const drops=Array.from({length:columns},()=>1);const draw=()=>{ctx.fillStyle='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.04)';ctx.fillRect(0,0,canvas.width,canvas.height);ctx.fillStyle='#0F0';ctx.font="".concat(fontSize,"px monospace");drops.forEach((drop,i)=>{const text=chars[Math.floor(Math.random()*chars.length)];ctx.fillText(text,i*fontSize,drop*fontSize);if(drop*fontSize>canvas.height&&Math.random()>0.975)drops[i]=0;drops[i]++;});};const interval=setInterval(draw,35);window.addEventListener('resize',resize);return()=>{clearInterval(interval);window.removeEventListener('resize',resize);};},[]);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("canvas",{id:"matrix-canvas",ref:canvasRef});};export default MatrixBackground;
